reviews.review_title: Very good game but a few bugs
reviews.review_description: The game is really cool cause it has lock down and as you guessed horror there is a nuke in the game that mods can use that is kinda buggy so otherwise all the bugs make it 4 stars

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! We have switched over to another theme, so It should be mostly fixed! -Phoenic (Owner/Developer)
